**Code Quality Review**

**clunger/src/index.ts — `restCockpitMetrics`**

1. **`spawnSync("cat", ["/proc/stat"])` instead of `fs.readFileSync`** (lines ~820-826). Using `spawnSync` to shell out to `cat` for `/proc` files is unnecessary overhead. Bun/Node can read these directly with `readFileSync`. Same pattern for `/proc/meminfo` and `/proc/net/dev`.

2. **Hardcoded network interface names** (`eth0`, `ens3`, `ens4`, line ~870)...(truncated)
